blocks.speaker: Daisy
blocks.content: You'll see me tomorrow. Our bikes are still at Hester's.
She was on the bottom porch step, almost exactly level with him. He hadn't planned that.

blocks.speaker: Daisy
blocks.content: What were you going to say?

blocks.speaker: Daisy
blocks.content: At the movie. You were looking at me like you were going to say something.

blocks.speaker: Kit
blocks.content: I wasn't going to say anything.
He looked at her. The porch light was in her hair.
She looked at him for a long second. Then she turned and went up the steps.
